diagrams.title: MITM Attack Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows the positioning of attacker between two communicating parties
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how attacker positions themselves to intercept and potentially modify communications

diagrams.title: Diffie-Hellman MITM Attack Flow
diagrams.description: Step-by-step of how Oscar intercepts and replaces public values in DH exchange
elements: Step 2: Alice sends g^a to Bob (intercepted by Oscar)
Step 3: Oscar computes g^o, sends to Alice
Step 4: Bob computes g^b, sends to Oscar
Step 5: Oscar computes g^o, sends to Bob
Step 6: Alice computes shared key with Oscar
Step 7: Bob computes shared key with Oscar
No direct key between Alice and Bob
diagrams.purpose: Understand how authenticated Diffie-Hellman prevents this attack

diagrams.title: SSL Stripping Attack
diagrams.description: Shows downgrade attack from HTTPS to HTTP enabling plaintext interception
diagrams.purpose: Understand how to defend against protocol downgrade attacks
